mapper.select:
select * from reginfotable,busertable,testinfo__room,roomtable,testinfotable,testtable where reginfotable.user_id=busertable.user_id and reginfotable.testinfo__room_id=testinfo__room.testinfo__room_id and testinfo__room.room_id=roomtable.room_id and testinfo__room.testinfo_id = testinfotable.testinfo_id and testinfotable.test_id = testtable.test_id and ""=""
and concat(reginfo_id) like concat('%',#{reginfo_id},'%')
and concat(tname) like concat('%',#{tname},'%')
and concat(uname) like concat('%',#{uname},'%')
and concat(rname) like concat('%',#{rname},'%')
